params.name: createdAt
params.description: Only return domains created at this exact date and time

params.name: createdAfter
params.description: Only return domains created after this date and time

params.name: createdBefore
params.description: Only return domains created before this date and time

params.name: updatedAt
params.description: Only return domains updated at this exact date and time

params.name: updatedAfter
params.description: Only return domains updated after this date and time

params.name: updatedBefore
params.description: Only return domains updated before this date and time

params.name: sort
params.description: Properties to sort by, with optional direction prefix (- for descending)

params.name: after
params.description: The paging cursor token from a previous response for pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results per page (default 10, max 100)

params.name: archived
params.description: Whether to return only archived domains

items.docs:
Returns all existing domains that have been created and connected to the HubSpot account.
Results can be filtered by creation or update date and paginated using cursor-based pagination.

info.name: Hubspot Get a Domain by Id

params.name: domainId
params.description: The unique identifier of the domain

items.docs:
Returns detailed information about a single domain identified by its unique ID.
The response includes configuration status, SSL settings, and usage information.
